text.title: JTBD Output Contract
text.summary: Pins the shape of a validated job statement. Subagent must satisfy this before returning.

field.name: job_statement
field.format: When <circumstance>, I want <motivation>, so I can <outcome>.

forbidden.pattern: evidence_quotes that are paraphrased or LLM-generated
competitive_set containing "do nothing" or "spreadsheets" WITHOUT verbatim transcript mention
milkshake-shaped reuse of canonical example as if it were data for this case
persona language in job_statement ("the marketing manager wants...")

allowed-transformations.transformation: Trim verbatim quotes for length, preserving specifics (numbers, named tools, time references).
Group similar pain statements but record the grouping with member count.

list.item: All three dimensions populated (functional + emotional + social)
All four forces tagged with severity
job_statement uses circumstance language, not persona language
